name: curate
description: Promote fugu-router playbooks into versioned golden eval datasets for evalkit: turn the append-only routing log into a curated, deduplicated holdout set. Mechanical acceptance criteria (`cargo test`, a backticked command) become runnable golden cases; the rest become drafts for a human to fill. The supply side of the offline eval loop. Subscription-native (one bundled Rust binary, no API key).
